name: Brookfield Corporation
confidenceReason: 19% CAGR for 30 years. $1T+ AUM. Launched $100B AI infrastructure fund. Management estimates 25% annual earnings growth over 5 years. But opaque corporate structure and distorted accounting.
bullCase: Management estimates 25% annual earnings growth over the next 5 years. AI infrastructure fund creates massive new growth vector. Insurance reintegration adds fee-generating scale. Ultimate real-asset compounder at scale.
bearCase: Extremely complex corporate structure makes analysis difficult. Low reported margins/ROIC due to consolidation accounting with $251B non-recourse debt. Rate-sensitive across many business lines. Valuation looks optically expensive on standard screens.

cagrModel.basis: Alt-asset manager; forward PE depressed by volatile carried interest/fair-value gains; exit PE reflects normalized distributable earnings multiple

screener.note: Cheap, but still stabilizing (downtrend remains active) (Used benchmark CV)
